message.content:
@startuml
actor browser as B
participant G_Shield as G_Shield
participant grabPay as grabPay

rectangle "deduction authorization and charge" {
    B -> G_Shield: insure
    G_Shield -> grabPay: deduction authorization
    B <- grabPay: authorization page
    B -> grabPay: confirm authorization
    grabPay <- B: authorization result
    G_Shield -> grabPay: authorization result
}

rectangle "loop [charge]" {
    G_Shield -> grabPay: silently charge
    grabPay -> G_Shield: charge result
    G_Shield -> grabPay: confirm receive
    grabPay -> G_Shield: underwriting
    G_Shield <- grabPay: underwriting
}

rectangle "refund" {
    B -> G_Shield: withdrawal
    G_Shield -> grabPay: withdrawal
    G_Shield -> grabPay: cancel authorization
    grabPay -> G_Shield: authorization result
    G_Shield -> grabPay: refund
    grabPay -> G_Shield: refund result
    G_Shield -> B: withdrawal result
}

@enduml
